channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: My doctor keeps focusing on my weight. What other health metrics matter more?
item.description: Our Real Talk with a Doc columnist explains how to push back if your doctor's obsessed with weight loss. And what other health metrics matter more ins...

item.title: Tips to Help Keep Your Eyes Healthy
Best Protein Sources for a Healthy, Balanced Diet
item.description: Looking to add more protein to your meals? Explore high-protein foods, including affordable options, to help meet your daily needs.

item.title: Scientists find a new clue to help them identify a healthy gut microbiome
item.description: Scientists are still trying to identify what a healthy gut microbiome looks like, but new research may offer a clue.

item.title: Physical and Emotional Symptoms of Depression
What I Wish I Knew About My Metabolism Way Before I Turned 35
item.description: What I wish I knew earlier about metabolic health past the age of 30 and beyond, and what's helped me the most.

item.title: A Bad Night's Sleep May Slow Your Brain by 33% â Here's Why
item.description: Plus, how to protect your brain when you're low on sleep

item.title: These 3 Zodiac Signs Always Feel Guilty â Are You One Of Them?
item.description: They put a lot of pressure on themselves.

item.title: Is This Viral TikTok Cardio Workout Any Better Than Running?
item.description: We finally have research on the 12-3-30 workout

item.title: Can Creatine Help With Brain Fog? How To Use This Supplement To Think Sharper
item.description: And, what to pair it with for even better results.

item.title: Why it's a bit surprising that the U.S. is attending a key global flu meeting
item.description: After the U.S. withdrew from the World Health Organization, it wasn't clear they would participate in this WHO-led meeting to determine the recipe for...

item.title: Can't get a prescription renewed? Here's how to cope with prior authorizations
item.description: These health care hurdles can stand in the way of getting treatment your doctor says you need. Here's what to know about how to deal with them.

item.title: Here are 5 health topics Trump avoided in his SOTU speech
item.description: Despite President Trump's aim to make health care a "Republican issue" for the midterms, his speech left out scientific research, MAHA, abortion and r...
